win_condition: Complete each story's objective as directed by the Storybook before all stuffies collapse simultaneously
message: Stuffed Fables is a fully cooperative storybook adventure. The stuffies win by completing the quest objectives described in the Storybook for each story. The players lose if all stuffies are collapsed at the same time. The Sleep Deck also determines story endings: if the Waking card is revealed before the stuffies win, the Waking ending triggers instead of the Asleep ending. There is no competitive scoring. Track your campaign progress through the seven interconnected stories.
